title: test(1796g): add 9 tests for internal-chat-listing.ts (2 functions, 0 prior coverage)
body:
## Summary

9 new tests covering `listConversations` and `listConversationsByAccount` in internal-chat-listing.ts. Zero prior coverage.

### Functions covered

| Function | Tests | Key scenarios |
|---|---|---|
| listConversationsByAccount | 5 | empty return, verifies external account, calls db.select, enriched shape, name derivation from participant |
| listConversations | 4 | empty return, resolves agent to account, enriched conversations with messages, method exposure |

### Key mocking insight

The Drizzle chain requires precise method ordering: `select().from().innerJoin().where().orderBy().limit().all()`. Each method must return an object with the next method in the chain. The second select call (for messages) uses `select().from().innerJoin().innerJoin().where().orderBy().all()` — a double innerJoin without a where between them.

All 9 tests pass.
Part of #1796 coverage expansion.
head: fix/1796g-internal-chat-listing-tests
